Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and related details) through a HubSpot form, triggering the automation workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, consistent input method that kicks off the entire catalog process instantly without any back-and-forth or manual handoff.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP system to retrieve all parts DFC currently stocks that are compatible with the submitted vehicle specification.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live, accurate inventory data in seconds rather than requiring someone to manually cross-reference part numbers in the system.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Compares the retrieved inventory data against a complete expected parts catalog for that vehicle and formats the findings, clearly separating what DFC stocks from what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a clean, structured comparison instantly that would otherwise require manual lookup and formatting, reducing catalog prep from hours to seconds.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file showing DFC's inventory coverage for the requested vehicle along with a clear list of missing parts.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a professional, ready-to-use catalog directly to Mark's inbox immediately after submission, enabling faster quoting and customer response times.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, capturing on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups with a single automated pull, recovering significant staff hours every week and eliminating inconsistent or outdated data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, actionable report that immediately shows where each part stands and which ones need urgent escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with the live status and estimated availability for each affected order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual effort of writing individual customer updates, ensuring customers receive timely, accurate communication while freeing staff to focus on resolution rather than reporting.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor catalog automatically that would take days to compile manually, giving DFC a complete view of the two-piece rotor market landscape.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor catalog against DFC's existing parts inventory and compiles the matched and unmatched fitments into a structured Google Sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly identifies whitespace opportunities where competitors offer coverage that DFC does not, turning a manual gap analysis into an automated strategic output.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from the market without requiring manual outreach campaigns, helping Dino prioritize which new fitments are worth pursuing.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — and extracts the full text content for analysis.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures every word across every active ad in seconds, making it possible to audit the entire ad account for specific phrases without manually opening individual ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews all extracted ad copy against the specified phrase list and flags every exact match, noting the ad ID, field type, and the precise copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Produces a precise, auditable flagged list in seconds that ensures no non-compliant or sensitive phrase is missed across the entire active ad portfolio.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy snippet where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act compliance or brand safety report directly to the responsible team member, enabling fast remediation without any manual digging.

summary: The automation pipeline is running strong with 55 total agents — 28 completed, 9 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no stage changes occurred across the pipeline. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, the growing base of 28 completed agents continues to run in the background, driving daily, weekly, and monthly workflows across email, SMS, SEO, paid media, and more. As we head into the weeks ahead, the 9 in-progress agents are steadily moving toward completion, with 18 planned agents ready to enter the queue — the roadmap ahead is packed with exciting builds!
